Part.Source:
Event Start
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardSteps = new()
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'BemVindo' &WizardStep.Title = 'Bem Vindo' &WizardStep.Description = 'Bem Vindo ao assistente' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Inicio' &WizardStep.Title = 'Inicio' &WizardStep.Description = 'Inicio' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Viagem' &WizardStep.Title = 'Viagem' &WizardStep.Description = 'Viagem' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'DocFiscais' &WizardStep.Title = 'Docs Fiscais' &WizardStep.Description = 'Docs Fiscais' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Impostos' &WizardStep.Title = 'Impostos' &WizardStep.Description = 'Impostos' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Pgto' &WizardStep.Title = 'Pagamentos' &WizardStep.Description = 'Pagamentos' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Obter' &WizardStep.Title = 'Transmitir' &WizardStep.Description = 'Transmitir' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
If &CurrentStep.IsEmpty() &CurrentStepAux = !'BemVindo' &WebSession.Remove(&Pgmname + !'_Data') Else &CurrentStepAux = &CurrentStep EndIf Do 'LoadWizardStepWC' StepTitles.Object = WizardStepsArrowWC.Create(&WizardSteps, &CurrentStepAux)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRetorno'
WwOperacaoTransporte.Call()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadWizardStepWC'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case &CurrentStepAux = !'BemVindo' WizardStepWC.Object = WPOperacaoTransporteBemVindo.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Inicio' WizardStepWC.Object = WPOperacaoTransporteInicio.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Viagem' WizardStepWC.Object = WPOperacaoTransporteViagem.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'DocFiscais' WizardStepWC.Object = WPOperacaoTransporteDocFiscais.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Impostos' WizardStepWC.Object = WPOperacaoTransporteImpostos.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Pgto' WizardStepWC.Object = WPOperacaoTransportePgto.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Obter' WizardStepWC.Object = WPOperacaoTransporteObter.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
